title: Alas.
content:
He led her out across the sand,
        And by her side did sit:
     He asked to hold her little hand,
        She sweetly answered, "Nit."
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edwin C. Ranck delivers a powerful performance in "Alas."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
